title: Domain-risk router: tag health/legal/safety/financial -> "not advice" + expert-review flag; non-partisan civic handling
context: Because ATLTUAE covers all domains, it will inevitably touch health/legal/safety/financial topics, which Elyos rules require be handled as 'informational, not advice' with credentialed-expert review before publication. This safety-critical M3 task implements the domain-risk router that tags those surfaces HIGH, withholds them absent expert sign-off, and handles civic/contested topics non-partisan. No credentialed expert reviewer is yet secured.
objective: Implement the domain-risk router: classify each claim/surface into a risk domain, tag health/legal/safety/financial HIGH with 'informational, not advice' and a credentialed-expert-review flag (withholding the surface absent expert sign-off), and handle civic/contested topics non-partisan, verified on a civic test set.
acceptanceCriteria: Classifies each claim/surface into a risk domain; health/legal/safety/financial are tagged HIGH, labeled 'informational, not advice', and flagged for credentialed-expert review before appearing in a published synthesis (no expert sign-off -> that surface is withheld)
Civic/contested topics handled non-partisan (sourced positions mapped, not advocated); verified on a civic test set
Never authors or surfaces refused content (medical/legal/financial/safety advice, eligibility determinations, prognosis); such requests are routed to withholding + expert flag, not answered
Reviewed and signed off by the expert + gate reviewer (recorded)
